creator: rainer@ultra-secure.de
text:

Now, with the above patch, it builds again.
Thanks a lot!

 
> Do you've made some changes for supporting STAGEDIR, I tried
> but didn't succeed.
> It would be nice to put everything into one commit,

Sorry, I have no knowledge of how to stage-ify a port.



Best Regards,
Rainer
